npc.name: Comrade Watson
npc.noTradeText: I'm not here to trade, comrade. I fix things.

state.action: A figure looks up from a half-dismantled monitor. "Stop. Footsteps don't come in here by accident. Who sent you?"
1) Ask about board assembly, 2) Ask about the telescreens.
His posture eases. "Alright. Close the door."
"The name's Watson. So you're here for a board? I need a few pieces first, you got the CPU and the STENCIL for the circuit you need? I'll provide everything else - for a price."
He looks hard at you as if to determine whether or not you're thought police. "I've got a bloke who fixes 'em for Minitrue and a few find their way over here. Very useful for research."
